members.title: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Jordan, Bahrain and Kuwait after US bombings
members.snippet: Iran targets Jordan and Gulf states after US bombs Iranian cities including Bandar Abbas, Sirik and Chabahar

events.headline: Indian tourists killed after speedboat capsizes in Vietnam

members.title: Indian tourists killed after speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
members.snippet: Fifteen Indian tourists have died after their speedboat capsized off Vietnam’s Phu Quoc Island.

events.headline: Whistleblower claims Kennedy Center ‘rushed’ renovations to please Trump

members.title: Whistleblower claims Kennedy Center ‘rushed’ renovations to please Trump
members.snippet: Democratic Senator Sheldon Whitehouse details rusting columns, uneven paint and unnecessary demolition under Trump.

events.headline: FIFA to sell pieces of World Cup final stadium pitch, could earn millions

members.title: FIFA to sell pieces of World Cup final stadium pitch, could earn millions
members.snippet: Pieces from the turf used at the stadium will go on sale as memorabilia and will be priced from $450 to $1,200.
